# Bootstrap Icons (bundled)

Icons from [Bootstrap Icons](https://icons.getbootstrap.com/) v1.13.1 (MIT License).

To refresh after upgrading the npm package:

```bash
npm install bootstrap-icons@1.13.1 --no-save
robocopy node_modules/bootstrap-icons/icons assets/vendor/bootstrap-icons/icons *.svg
copy node_modules/bootstrap-icons/LICENSE assets/vendor/bootstrap-icons/LICENSE
```
